sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55692" key="kate/acis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατ-έαξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n55692.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">confractio</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
